description: HTTP fetch allowlist. All AI provider API calls (Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama) go via Rust reqwest — not the webview fetch() API — so no Tauri webview HTTP capability is needed. Phase 5 deviation: tauri-plugin-http is not installed; adding http:default here causes a build error. The URLs https://api.anthropic.com/**, https://api.openai.com/**, and http://localhost:11434/** are listed in docs/design/CAPABILITIES.md as the intended allowlist for reference, but are not expressed as capability permissions since reqwest bypasses the Tauri HTTP scope entirely. See Phase 5 and 6a-iii Execution Notes.
